main.description: Aggregate (anonymous) vote result for a single song in a single round. Individual ballots are never published.

song.description: AT-URI of the site.eptss.song record this result is for.

average.description: Mean vote score on the round's voting scale (typically 1–10).

count.description: Number of votes cast for this song in this round.

distribution.description: Vote count by score bucket, indexed from 1. distribution[0] = number of 1-votes, distribution[9] = number of 10-votes.

publishedAt.description: When this aggregate was finalized and published. Should be after the round's votingOpens close.
